name: AppDeploy MCP Server — AI-to-Live Web Apps
what_it_does: MCP server for AppDeploy — turns app ideas described in AI chat into live full-stack web applications. Enables AI agents to take natural language app descriptions and deploy them as running web applications, handling code generation, hosting, and deployment automatically.
use_cases: Converting natural language app descriptions into deployed web applications from product agents
Rapid prototyping of web application ideas by spinning up live demos from ideation agents
Building and deploying simple full-stack apps from non-technical user requests
Automating proof-of-concept web app deployment from AI development agents
not_for: Production-grade enterprise applications requiring custom infrastructure
Applications requiring specific tech stacks or custom backends
Teams needing full source code control and custom deployment pipelines
best_when: A non-technical user or product team wants to quickly deploy a live web application from an idea — skipping the complexity of setting up hosting, writing boilerplate code, or managing infrastructure.
avoid_when: You need production-quality applications with specific requirements, compliance, or performance SLAs. AppDeploy is for rapid prototyping and simple web apps.

auth.notes: AppDeploy account required. Deployed applications run on AppDeploy's infrastructure. Review data handling and hosting terms.

pricing.notes: Emerging AI-to-app service — pricing not publicly documented. Infrastructure hosting costs likely.

known_agent_gotchas: App deployment latency (30s-2min) requires async handling — not suitable for synchronous agent flows
Generated applications run on AppDeploy's infrastructure — understand hosting terms before production use
Generated code quality varies — review before making deployed apps public
App descriptions must be clear — vague prompts produce unpredictable applications
Emerging service — availability and deployment reliability not yet proven at scale
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Deploying live web applications. Generated applications may have security vulnerabilities. Infrastructure shared on AppDeploy. Review before making apps public.

security_score_components.security_notes: Live application deployment with AI-generated code. Security of generated code unverified. Shared hosting infrastructure. Review applications before public access.
